name: Smoked Yellow Pepper Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 2 yellow bell peppers, cold smoked, peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the peppers, chipotle, onion, and lime juice.
Blend until smooth.
2. Slowly add the olive oil while the blender is running to emulsify the mixture.
Continue blending until well combined.
3. Add the sugar and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Adjust seasoning as desired.
